title: senecio unionis
intro: Senecio unionis, also known as Groundsel, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Groundsel has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Groundsel include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Groundsel can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and skin irritations.
